title: Archoil AR6400-D MAX Pro DPF Cleaner Diesel Fuel System, Diesel Injector Cleaner, Turbo, CAT Cleaner Concentrate - High Strength Carbon Removal & Exhaust Emissions Reduction for MOT Pass (400ml)
features: FAST, SAFE AND THOROUGH CLEANING. Suitable for all diesel engines, AR6400-D engine MAX contains a proprietary blend of carefully selected diesel additives / detergents and acts as a diesel particulate filter cleaner, egr cleaner and entire fuel system cleaner (fuel injectors, fuel filter, fuel pump, fuel lines). Also cleans engine, combustion area, glow plugs, turbo, DPF and catalytic converter.

RESOLVES AND PREVENTS RUNNING ISSUES. This diesel engine cleaner helps free a problematic EGR and rapidly reduces harmful emissions and unwanted smoke from the exhaust. Resolve engine running issues and restore lost engine performance and fuel economy. Enjoy a smoother and more responsive engine.

RESTORES ENGINE PERFORMANCE AND IMPROVES FUEL ECONOMY. This diesel fuel additive / diesel cleaner has been shown to enhance fuel mileage year round, by acting as a diesel fuel system cleaner, fuel injector cleaner, diesel turbo cleaner and catalytic converter cleaner.
FULL ESTER LUBRICATION. Additional diesel treatment functions include a proven Cetane Improver using the highest purity 2-EHN, proprietary ester lubricant, water remover and much more.

CUSTOMER SATISFACTION IS OUR PRIORITY. Feel free to contact us if you have any query regarding this petrol cleaner. All Archoil fuel cleaners include professional support and Performance and Emissions Pass Guarantee. Over a decade of success and trusted by professionals.
description: Product Description ARCHOIL AR6400-D MAX A rapid improvement in engine technology has resulted in an imbalance between engine design and fuel quality. This combined with non-optimum driving conditions can result in an accumulation of deposits in the fuel system, combustion area, turbo, diesel particulate filter (DPF) and catalytic converter (CAT). These deposits effect performance, fuel economy, exhaust emissions and engine refinement. They can also cause engine warning lights or restrictive “limp home” conditions. To address these issues Archoil has released its latest high-strength diesel cleaner, AR6400-D MAX. AR6400-D MAX is a powerful next-generation all-in-one fuel system, engine, turbo, DPF and CAT cleaner. It is the culmination of years of research and the decision to combine the original AR6400-D Engine Cleaner, AR6500 DPF Cleaner and AR6600 Turbo Cleaner technologies providing the greatest value and product performance into a single treatment. Features / Benefits Rapidly Cleans Fuel System & Combustion Area Removes Deposits from Turbo, DPF & CAT Raises Cetane Index Number Smooths Rough Idling Lowers Harmful Exhaust Emissions Lubricates & Protects the Fuel System Restores Lost Performance & Economy Fuel System Cleaner AR6400-D MAX quickly restores engine performance and fuel economy lost through deposit build-up in key parts of the fuel system, engine and emission control systems. Molecule by molecule deposits are safely removed. AR6400-D Max helps restore variable geometry turbo operation and diesel particulate filter regeneration. AR6400-D MAX will remove all forms of deposits from fuel injectors including carbons, varnish and stubborn lacquers. AR6400-D MAX will effectively clean older as well as modern Euro 5/6 specification fuel systems. It is suitable for all diesel engines running on pump, bunkered or bio-diesel blended fuel. Lubricant AR6400-D MAX delivers a modern lubricant helping to protect high pressure injection systems and fuel pumps during the cleaning process. Cetane Booster & Combustion Catalyst AR6400-D MAX contains a cetane booster to improve combustion efficiency and engine performance, whilst reducing engine noise. A combustion catalyst technology then facilitates a cleaner burn, improving combustion quality further. These additional functions not only provide an instant improvement in performance but facilitate the cleaning function by keeping recirculating hydrocarbons as low as possible.
